L1_headline: SEM – Q3 2025 earnings release and dividend declared. | 10/30/25
L2_brief: Select Medical Holdings reported Q3 2025 financial results and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0625 per share payable November 25, 2025. This is a routine operational filing with no merger or acquisition activity disclosed.

L3_detailed.event: Company announced Q3 2025 financial results and declared quarterly cash dividend
L3_detailed.deal_implications: No merger or acquisition activity disclosed in this filing; not relevant for merger arbitrage purposes
